look.text: Penny Farthing: croupier's waistcoat, welding goggles pushed up into her hair, the expression of someone doing sums you couldn't follow.

talk.speaker: target
talk.text: Fondant? Oh, that's easy — here, patented pocket shortbread. Real butter. Do NOT eat it yourself, it's mission-critical.

talk.speaker: target
talk.text: Reconnaissance, Grey. Ask around. Barmen know everything worth knowing.

talk.speaker: target
talk.text: Focus, Grey. Doomsday at four o'clock. Well — one minute past.

itemUse.speaker: target
itemUse.text: It's not even lunchtime. Keep it — I have a feeling about that olive.

itemUse.speaker: target
itemUse.text: I KNOW it's good. It's not FOR us.
